final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [4:0] lfsr_out
);
    wire unused_feedback;

    assign unused_feedback = lfsr_out[4] ^ lfsr_out[1]; // x^5 + x^2 + 1 unused_feedback

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            lfsr_out <= 5'b00001; // Initial seed value
        end else begin
            lfsr_out <= {lfsr_out[3:0], unused_feedback}; // Shift left and insert unused_feedback
        end
    end
endmodule
